data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for per-user leave balances.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the per-user leave balances, which is a critical component of the leave and PTO-aware scheduling guard. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data regarding leave balances, leading to an inconclusive result. The linked use case mentions the need for per-user leave balances, but no concrete evidence is presented to confirm their existence or correctness.
gaps: No evidence of per-user leave balances.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
